steps.name: POST runs/{id}/cancel - best-effort abort after current node (BR-1, BR-4)
Wire remaining tests + verify all Acceptance Criteria

decisions.decision: Task text says "extend 1-4's matrix" but ProjectStatus (app/services/state_machine.py, projects.status) has no RUNNING/CANCELLED value -- those are PipelineRun.status values (app/pipeline/state.py RunStatus, migration 008's ck_pipeline_runs_status CHECK). Added a separate app/services/run_state_machine.py instead of touching state_machine_edges.py, with tests at backend/tests/unit/services/test_run_state_machine.py (task text suggested backend/tests/unit/state_machine/test_transitions.py, which doesn't match this repo's actual test layout -- no tests/unit/state_machine/ directory exists for 1-4 either).
decisions.why: reversible/locally-scoped per autonomy-policy.md; avoids conflating two independently-versioned status columns
